description: Test SQL injection vulnerability detection across multiple languages

evals.prompt: Scan this Python file for SQL injection vulnerabilities
evals.expected_output: Identifies string concatenation vulnerability, provides parameterized query fix, rates as CRITICAL severity
expectations: Detects string concatenation in execute() call
Reports CRITICAL severity for user input concatenation

evals.prompt: Scan this JavaScript file for SQL injection
evals.expected_output: Identifies template literal vulnerability in query execution
expectations: Reports HIGH severity for unsafe query construction
Suggests query builder or ORM alternatives

evals.prompt: Scan this C# file for SQL injection
Scan this directory and report all vulnerabilities
evals.expected_output: Finds vulnerabilities in all test files, provides summary statistics
expectations: Scans multiple file types (py, js, cs)

evals.prompt: Verify this Python file uses safe patterns
evals.expected_output: Confirms parameterized queries are used correctly, no vulnerabilities found
expectations: Confirms proper use of parameterized queries
No false positives for safe code
